title: Deployed and promoted AI Coding Tools Comparison Matrix 2026
summary: Comparison matrix (217 lines, 11 tools) deployed via Capistrano to ralphworkflow.com. Sitemap pings sent to Google and Bing. write.as/Telegraph syndication blocked (content filter + deprecated API). This opens a new non-saturated SEO content authority lane.
expected_outcomes: Rank for comparison-intent keywords (AI coding tools compared 2026, Claude Code vs Cursor, etc.)
Generate organic backlinks from developers referencing the comparison table
Position Ralph Workflow naturally within the ecosystem comparison rather than in isolation
Drive qualified traffic to Codeberg-primary repo via the embedded CTA
kill_condition: No organic traffic to the comparison page within 14 days, or zero backlinks within 30 days
success_metric: Codeberg adoption movement (stars/watchers/forks delta > 0) within 30 days attributable to the new lane
